problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
